report_name: Shinyhunters Ransomware Group Claims Attacks on Zara and Aman Resorts, Threatens Data Leak

threat_actors.name: Shinyhunters
threat_actors.description: A resurfaced data extortion group that claimed responsibility for cyberattacks against Aman Resorts and Zara, using a 'Pay or Leak' model to demand payment.
threat_actors.goals: Financial extortion through the theft and threatened publication of sensitive data.

attack_patterns.name: Data from Cloud Storage
attack_patterns.description: Used by Shinyhunters to exfiltrate 500,000 Salesforce records from Aman Resorts and data from Zara's Google BigQuery data warehouse.

attack_patterns.name: Valid Accounts: Cloud Accounts
attack_patterns.description: Allegedly used to access Zara's Google BigQuery data by stealing service account keys or user credentials, potentially via a vulnerability in the Anodot.com platform.

attack_patterns.name: Data from Information Repositories
attack_patterns.description: The overall strategy used by Shinyhunters to access and steal data from the victims' Salesforce and Google BigQuery cloud-based information repositories.

attack_patterns.name: Data Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: Used to exfiltrate the stolen data from the victims' cloud environments as part of the double extortion attack.

malware.name: Shinyhunters Ransomware
malware.description: A ransomware family associated with the Shinyhunters group. In the attacks against Zara and Aman Resorts, it was used for data exfiltration and extortion rather than encryption.

vulnerabilities.name: Anodot.com Platform Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: An unspecified vulnerability in the Anodot.com business intelligence platform that was allegedly exploited by Shinyhunters to gain access to Zara's Google BigQuery data.

identities.name: Aman Resorts
identities.description: A luxury hotel chain targeted by the Shinyhunters group, which claimed to have stolen 500,000 customer records from its Salesforce instance.

identities.name: Zara
identities.description: A global fashion retailer targeted by the Shinyhunters group, which claimed to have compromised its Google BigQuery data warehouse.

identities.name: Anodot.com
identities.description: A business intelligence platform implicated by Shinyhunters as the entry point for the Zara data breach due to an alleged vulnerability.

infrastructure.name: Shinyhunters Leak Site
infrastructure.description: A public leak site used by the Shinyhunters group to announce data breaches and issue 'Pay or Leak' ultimatums to its victims.
